name: Liu Guoliang
nameEn: LIU GUOLIANG 路 Reverse Penhold Pioneer 路 Grand Slam

tags.text: 馃弳 World Cup Singles Champion

timeline.subtitle: Emerging on International Stage
achievements: 馃弳 China Open Men's Singles Champion
馃搶 Reverse penhold technique maturing

timeline.subtitle: Atlanta Olympic Double
achievements: 馃 Atlanta Olympics Men's Singles Gold (beat Wang Tao in final)
馃 Atlanta Olympics Men's Doubles Gold (with Kong Linghui)
馃搶 First Chinese male Olympic singles champion

timeline.subtitle: First World Cup Title
achievements: 馃弳 Men's World Cup Singles Champion

timeline.subtitle: World Championships Triumph 路 Grand Slam
achievements: 馃弳 Eindhoven World Championships Men's Singles Champion (beat Ma Lin in final)
馃搶 Completed Grand Slam with Olympic, World and World Cup singles titles
馃搶 First male Grand Slam champion in Chinese history

timeline.subtitle: World Doubles Three-peat
achievements: 馃弳 Osaka World Championships Men's Doubles Champion (with Kong Linghui, three-peat)

timeline.subtitle: Retirement & Coaching
achievements: 馃搶 Later became head coach of Chinese men's team and CTTA President

achievements.title: 猸?Grand Slam
achievements.description: Liu Guoliang is the first male Grand Slam champion in Chinese history, winning singles titles at the Olympics (1996), World Championships (1999), and World Cup (1996). He pioneered the reverse penhold backhand technique. With Kong Linghui, they were known as the 'Twin Stars'. After retirement, he became head coach and led the Chinese team to continued dominance.
